full_text:
Tanshihuai 檀石槐
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tanshihuai (檀石槐). Tanshihuai led the Xianbei in raiding Han China. Defeated Han forces in AD 177. Tanshihuai was affiliated with Xianbei. Tanshihuai lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
